title: Knowledge management opportunities at Meili
author: Wilkinson, Laura J.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Report of a knowledge management opportunities research project carried out at a French tech start-up in January 2022. 

 The report examines the quantitative and qualitative data I obtained from my study, makes recommendations for what we should stop, keep, and start doing across different areas of our work, and concludes with next steps to kick off the action phase.
steps_raw:
